candidates.md_verbatim: | RELMIDS | Relationship to Disease Milestone Instance. Usually populated with a textual description of the temporal relationship between the observation and the disease milestone named in MIDS. Its function is similar to --ELTM, except that RELMIDS is represented as ISO 8601 duration. CT has not yet been developed for RELMIDS, but is likely to include terms such as "IMMEDIATELY BEFORE", "AT START OF", "DURING", "AT END OF", and "SHORTLY AFTER". |
